title: erlangea angustifolia
intro: Erlangea angustifolia, a flowering plant native to tropical Africa, is also known as African teak or African boxwood. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Erlangea angustifolia include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, as well as in traditional medicine, due to its efficacy in treating a range of health issues.
